name: Lumache Con Mascarpone e Noci (Shells with Cheese and Nuts)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Walnuts, toasted and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta to the al dente stage; drain.
2. Melt butter in a fireproof serving dish. Add the mascarpone cheese (or whipping cream) and stir until combined. Do not allow it to boil.
3. Add the cooked pasta to the warm mascarpone mixture, coating it well. Stir in the parmesan cheese and chopped walnuts.
4. Serve with extra parmesan cheese to taste. This dish is very rich, so a little goes a long way.
Prep time: 15 minutes
Cook time: 15 minutes
